stemHtml: According to OPS regulations, for operations under IFR or at night the minimum flight crew is 2 pilots for…

options.a: all turbo-propeller aeroplanes and all turbo-jet aeroplanes with a maximum approved passenger seating configuration of more than 9
options.b: all turbo-propeller aeroplanes and all turbo-jet aeroplanes
options.c: all turbo-propeller aeroplanes with a maximum approved passenger seating configuration of more than 19 and for all turbo-jet aeroplanes
options.d: all turbo-propeller aeroplanes with a maximum approved passenger seating configuration of more than 9 and for all turbo-jet aeroplanes
